spec.name: By The Altar
spec.description: You are by the temple altar in the northern end of Temple of New Thalos. A huge altar made of highly polished black onyx is standing in front of you. Behind this altar sits a twelve foot tall statue of Akbal, the highest god in all the lands.

extra_descs.description: Looking up the huge statue you see Akbal calmly gazing out across his lands, he seems pleased.
